feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change from MsgType FIDCC2 to ACC_DOCUMENT
entry.content:
We have received an request from Accounting to send the postings from the Treasury System to the FI system with Idoctype ACC_DOCUMENT04 (message type ACC_DOCUMENT) in the future. We are currently sending the Idoc type FIDCCP02 (message type FIDCC2). Additional data should not be enriched. It is about the fact that in the S4 FI system (new S4 FI system live since 2026) the processing of this Idoc type can be carried out better.
What activities do I have to do to change the sending of postings from FIDCC2 transactions to type ACC_DOCUMENT? Is there any SAP advice available?

entry.title: Default Cost Center for Postings for Statistical Project
entry.content:
Hi gurus

I have created a statistical project where I have added a Default Cost Center for Postings, then I have created more WBS and released the project. I add a budget to that cost center so that it works correctly.

The problem arises when I try to place a purchase order (through the me21n app). There is no problem with any WBS in the first order, but if I try to change the Default Cost Center for Postings in the project to another cost center with a budget and place the purchase order again, it only takes the main WBS with that cost center.

In other words, the sub-items do not work with that new cost center, and an error pops up saying that the previous cost center has no budget (which makes me think that it is still linked to the cost center of the project release).

Is this behavior correct, or am I missing a step?

Best regards, I hope you can resolve my question.

entry.title: Product range for contract in S4 Hana on premise
entry.content:
Currently SAP CRM do allow to create a partner product range -- where we can create a product groups without any partner and save it, This can be used in contract creation which avoid multiple product entries .

We are currently looking for similar process in S4 hana on premise. Do we have any available document for reference or anybody has implemented similar process

entry.title: DMS_RELOCATE_CONTENT Selektionsparameter
entry.content:
Hi All, 

as I am about to migrate DMS Content from one Repository to another i want to use the report DMS_RELOCATE_CONTENT Report. Initially I tested it with a single Document and it worked perfectly. I used to select the exact Documentnumber.

Later I tried to move 100 Documents by using the selection criteria Dokumenttype "Z1E" which contains those 100 Documents I wanted to select. But it never finds the Documents by this selection. 
As I copied then the 100 documentsnumbers again out of the table and inserted them into the corresponding selection field it worked. 

 

 


Does anyone understand why it does not work when I select anything else but the exact Document numbers?

As I have to migrat millions of documents I cant do it with the document numbers. I should be able to make portions by selecting ranges. Prefered by selection of creation date. As I tried to do this as well, again no documents have been selected to move into the new repository.

Thanks for your help!

Dani

entry.title: What contains under unused_data of disk_overview query
entry.content:
Hello team,
We want to know what exactly is contained under the unused_data of the disk_overview query.

There no any sap note/kba/blog to provide excatly wahat is available in un_used data.

Thanks,

Ameya

entry.title: Type of store EWM without exit rules - pick point
entry.content:
Good afternoon, I share a concern that came to me, and I hope someone can help me with this: 
I request that for the type of warehouse AAAA, in warehouse AL01, the EWM configuration be changed so that it does not carry out withdrawal by FEFO. It must allow for the withdrawal of any batch. (This material is handled by HU and presents several batches).
This requirement arises because the product is stored in the type of warehouse AAAA in a chaotic way; when they are removed to the WIP (by means of the MF60), the operators remove the resin that they have most at hand. 
The idea is to ensure that the type of warehouse AAAA does not propose a batch when I create the warehouse task, but rather that when I perform picking in RF, I can **bleep** the batch that is closest.
It has been tested by removing the FEFO goods exit rules in SPRO for that type of warehouse: - Specify the search sequence for the type of warehouse
- Define warehouse exit control indicator
- Determine the warehouse type search sequence for output
Also, the output indicator from the master data in /scwm/mat1 was removed. With this it is achieved that the system does not let you create the task automatically but if by hand, but despite that it still proposes a particular batch.
It is impo

entry.title: Error during Portugal Settlement Document Creation – Series Not Registered for Validation Code
entry.content:
System: SAP S/4HANA (Development)

Country: Portugal (PT)

Issue Description:
During the creation of settlement documents for Portugal with digital signature enabled, the system is preventing document posting with an error related to series validation.

Error Message:

Series LPXX is not registered for validation code; posting is not allowed.

Configuration Performed:
The following configurations have been completed:

  1. Number range maintained for Portugal using object GLO_PT_SET.
  2. Number ranges recorded for the digital signature of settlement documents.
  3. The same number range maintained under object W_LFAKTURA.
  4. Country/Region-specific number ranges defined by assigning the same internal number range to country PT.

Observed Behavior:
Despite completing the above configurations, the system throws the validation code error while creating the settlement document and does not allow posting.

Testing Status:
The issue is currently being tested in the development system. Once the issue is resolved and confirmed, the business will proceed with registering the series on the Portuguese Tax Authority portal.

Request:
Kindly advise if any additional configuration or prerequisite is required to resolve this error, or confirm whether series registration and validation code maintenance is mandatory even for development/testing environments.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Unsupported Data Type DECFLOAT16 in RAP Service Binding – SAP S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently developing a RAP (RESTful Application Programming) report in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise to send data from SAP to a third-party system using CPI. In this report, I am performing calculations based on different functional scenarios.

In one scenario, I need to compare two custom fields (from custom tables). One field has the data type CHAR(16) and the other has the data type DF16_DEC.

When I try to compare them directly in Eclipse, I get a syntax error due to the data type mismatch. To resolve this, I converted both fields to DECFLOAT16 using a CASE statement. With this approach, the syntax error is resolved.

However, when I create a service binding on top of the service consumption model, I receive the following error:

Unsupported data type DECFLOAT16 for elements.

Could you please share your suggestions on how to handle this issue properly in RAP? Also, if you have any helpful blogs or references that address this scenario, I would greatly appreciate it.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Concur - Similar to ICS, we need budget integration from SAP S/4 with Concur.
entry.content:
hi Team

Concur - Similar to ICS, we need budget integration from SAP S/4 with Concur.

Please tell me how we can achieveit 

Regards

Surjith

entry.title: Vendor Confirmation in FK08 after creation of vendor
entry.content:
We have maintained bank & payment related fields as sensitive fields which approver need to confirm after making the changes. 

We are getting the message for confirmation of changes even when we have not maintained any of the sensitive fields in the vendor master yet. 

Do we need to confirm the vendor after creating even without maintaining the sensitive fields?

If yes, is there any SAP note or KBA supporting this?

We are using SAP S/4Hana private cloud 2023 edition.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: On SAP GUI, when I want to change a T-code in a composite role, what should I do?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

On SAP GUI, when I want to change a T-code in a Composite Role, what should I do?

Thanks,
QuocDT5

entry.title: Service Contract Cancellation Error
entry.content:
I am using ODATA V4 Service contract API for cancelling a service contract header. And sending this payload: 

{
    "ServiceContrCancellationReason": "V001",
    "ServiceContractCanclnParty": "CNVD",
    "SrvcContrCancellationDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z"
}

 The first call was successful. Now, If I send another request it throws following error : 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "/IWBEP/CM_V4S_RUN/000",
        "message": "Unspecified provider error occurred. See Error Context and Call Stack.",
        "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory": "Provider_Application_Error",
        "innererror": {
            "ErrorDetails": {
                "@SAP__common.Application": {
                    "ComponentId": "CRM-S4-SRV-CTR",
                    "ServiceRepository": "SRVD_A2X",
                    "ServiceId": "API_SERVICECONTRACT",
                    "ServiceVersion": "0001"
                },
                "@SAP__common.TransactionId": "6DFFBDC8ADC50270E0069A42188B54BC",
                "@SAP__common.Timestamp": "20260301112248.734489",
                "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution": {
                    "Analysis": "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
                    "Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}


But why ? I have seen other service contract header cancellation API can be called multiple times. But here it is failing after first successful call. Any suggestion ? 

The service contract has following start and end date: 

    "ServiceContractStartDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z",
    "ServiceContractEndDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z",

entry.title: Service Contract Cancellation Error
entry.content:
I am using ODATA V4 API to cancel a service contract. The payload I sent looks like 

{
    "ServiceContrCancellationReason": "V001",
    "ServiceContractCanclnParty": "CNVD",
    "SrvcContrCancellationDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z"
}

The request was successful at first attempt. But all consecutive request is failing with following error: 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "/IWBEP/CM_V4S_RUN/000",
        "message": "Unspecified provider error occurred. See Error Context and Call Stack.",
        "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory": "Provider_Application_Error",
        "innererror": {
            "ErrorDetails": {
                "@SAP__common.Application": {
                    "ComponentId": "CRM-S4-SRV-CTR",
                    "ServiceRepository": "SRVD_A2X",
                    "ServiceId": "API_SERVICECONTRACT",
                    "ServiceVersion": "0001"
                },
                "@SAP__common.TransactionId": "6DFFBDC8ADC50270E0069A42188B54BC",
                "@SAP__common.Timestamp": "20260301112248.734489",
                "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution": {
                    "Analysis": "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
                    "Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

Not sure why it is not working. The current contract looks something like : 

    "ServiceContractStartDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z",
    "ServiceContractEndDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z",
    "ServiceContractCanclnParty": "CNVD",
    "ServiceContrCancellationReason": "V001",
    "SrvcContrCancellationDateTime": "2026-02-19T00:00:00Z",
    "ServiceContractCanclnSts": "C",

Any help is highly appreciated. Earlier I could send multiple requests even after cancellation without error.

entry.title: RISE Private Cloud – On-prem subnet unreachable after ISP failover
entry.content:
We are running SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud (our Hyperscaler is AWS) connected to on-premise via Direct Connect with dual ISP backup.

During primary ISP failure, connectivity to a specific on-premise subnet is lost while other subnets remain reachable.

This suggests a potential routing asymmetry or selective route propagation issue during failover.

We would like to validate routing symmetry and reachability from the SAP cloud side.

Questions:

  • Is it possible to execute traceroute or TCP connectivity tests from SAP managed application servers in AWS environments?
  • Is this typically handled by SAP Cloud Operations via incident ticket?
  • Are there recommended validation procedures from SAP side during customer ISP failover scenarios?

entry.title: CDS-Based OData 2.0 – Power BI Service Returns Status Code 400 (Invalid Credentials) for Production
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are experiencing an issue with a CDS-based OData service (auto-published via @odata.publish: true) when connecting from Power BI Service.

System & Technical Info:

  • OData Version: 2.0

  • Authentication Type: Basic Authentication

  • Same User ID used in both clients

  • User authorizations confirmed identical (Full Access)

Issue Details:

  • Client 300 (Production) – Power BI Service: Fails with “Failed to update data source credentials: The credentials provided for the OData source are invalid. Status Code: 400.”

  • Client 300 – Power BI Desktop: Works without issues

  • Client 180 (Development) – Power BI Service & Desktop: Works without issues

  • OData URLs (Client 180 & 300): Both accessible and responsive

Checks Performed:

  • No authorization errors in SU53

  • No relevant errors in /IWFND/ERROR_LOG

  • Roles and authorizations between clients verified identical

Question:
Has anyone encountered a situation where a CDS-based OData service works in Power BI Desktop, works in Power BI Service for one client, but fails in Power BI Service for another client with Status Code 400?

Which additional checks would you recommend for:

  • CDS OData activation consistency

  • /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE registration

  • SICF node configuration differences

  • Client-specific security or profile parameters

  • Basic Authentication handling in Power BI Service

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Where can I download SAP GUI?
entry.content:
Hello, we cannot find the SAP GUI in the catalog https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter  please give me the right link where we can download it.

Thanks

entry.title: KSEF QR Code Generation
entry.content:
Hi 

I have a question regarding implementing the KSEF QR code on Invoices . 

I know the QR code is made of a structure of : 

 

 

>Invoice Number : Eg : 0913502961

> Invoice date: Eg : 2025-11-28
>Seller NIP: Eg : 5252987654
>Invoice hash (SHA-256): abc123xyz456...(Base64URL encoded) Eg : UtQp9Gpc51y-u3xApZjIjgkpZ01js-J8KflSPW8WzIE

Most of the data above we know how to get , however we have a problem generating and retriving the Invoice hash (SHA-256). 

Can someone help point us in the right direction as to how to get this data from and how its computed . 

Any help is appreciated 

Thanks 

RK

entry.title: WHT (Withholding Tax) input when create PR (Purchase Requisition) or PO (Purchase Order)
entry.content:
Hi All FI Experts.

If we may know,
currently there is an inquiry from the end-user about the feasibility on setting-up or configuring the automatic calculation of WHT (Withholding Tax) based amount at document line-item level when parking/posting invoice using transaction code MIR7 or MIRO; by firstly having WHT Tax and WHT Code information at PO Item level since PR (Purchase Requisition)/PO (Purchase Order) creation using transaction code ME51N or ME21N.

Would you like to kindly help us on giving advice whether there is any particular technical ABAP coding using BAPI / BAdI, or relevant statement arranged in Validation GGB0, or another way needed for this requirement, please? 

Thank you so much, and we are looking forward to discussing this with you.

Ani.

 

cc @raghavendra_praveen @Priya2310 @Divyesh_Mistry  @former_member682878  @former_member183424  @JL23  @s_raghavan @former_member466170 @akshyadhingra @anss_shahid 

MM (Materials Management) FIN (Finance) MM Purchasing MM Invoice Verification SAP Invoice and Goods Receipt Reconciliation  SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN Posting and Taxes

entry.title: Transferring Work Center Hierarchy to SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Wanted to know whether work center Hierarchy created via CR21 in S/4 can be transferred to SAP Digital Manufacturing.

 

Regards,

Rahaman

entry.title: Question:Whether the NetWeaver SDK can be used with S/4HANA 2025 and its support expiration date
entry.content:
Is it possible to communicate with SAP S/4HANA 2025 (on-premises/private cloud) using the NetWeaver RFC SDK?

Additionally, while the end of support for the NetWeaver RFC SDK has been announced for the end of 2027, is there a successor product available after this date?
